name: codex-agent-skills
description: Load-bearing engineering workflows for Codex, organized around seven small lifecycle entry points.

interface.shortDescription: Seven disciplined workflows for building, testing, reviewing, and shipping with Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native adaptation of lifecycle-oriented engineering skills. The plugin keeps a small command-like entry surface while loading deeper skills for specs, planning, implementation, testing, review, simplification, and shipping.
defaultPrompt: Use spec to define this feature before coding.
Use build to implement the next planned slice.
Use ship to decide whether this change is ready.
